subject: LIGO/Virgo/KAGRA S230708bi: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration, the Virgo Collaboration, and the
KAGRA Collaboration report:

The trigger S230708bi is no longer considered to be a candidate of
interest. Data surrounding the trigger is consistent with a known
class of instrumental artifacts at LIGO Livingston.
